title: Get Activity Intraday by Date
description:
This endpoint retrieves the activity intraday time series data for a given resource on a specific date or 24 hour period. Intraday support can extend the detail-level response to include 1min, 5min and 15min for Activity.

3rd-party developers who want access to retrieve other Fitbit users’ Intraday data through the “Client” or “Server” application type should submit a request by filling out this form . A Fitbit developer’s personal Intraday data is automatically available through the “Personal” application type. You do not need to submit a request.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: The resource of the data to be returned. Supported: calories | distance | elevation | floors | steps | swimming-strokes

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: The date in the format yyyy-MM-dd or today .

parameters.name: detail-level
parameters.description: Number of data points to include. Supported: 1min | 5min | 15min

parameters.name: start-time
parameters.description: The start of the time period in the format HH:mm .

parameters.name: end-time
parameters.description: The end of the time period in the format HH:mm .

parameters.name: timezone
parameters.description: Returns the response from the specified timezone. Supported: UTC

response_fields.name: activities-<resource> : datetime
response_fields.description: The date of the recorded resource in the format yyyy-MM-dd.

response_fields.name: activities-<resource> : value
response_fields.description: The specified resource's daily total or the total during the time period specified.

response_fields.name: activities-<resource>-intraday : dataset : level
response_fields.description: Numerical value representing the user's activity-level at the moment when the resource was recorded. 0 = sedentary 1 = lightly active 2 = fairly/moderately active 3 = very active Returned only when resource = calories.

response_fields.name: activities-<resource>-intraday : dataset : mets
response_fields.description: METs value at the moment when the resource was recorded. Returned only when resource = calories.

response_fields.name: activities-<resource>-intraday : dataset : time
response_fields.description: The time of the recorded resource.

response_fields.name: activities-<resource>-intraday : dataset : value
response_fields.description: The specified resource's value at the time it is recorded.
